changelog: NEW: QR-code shortcut on the payment screen. Point a second phone's camera at it and it opens an email pre-filled with the recipient address, the $40 CAD amount, and your Order Number — eliminates typos.
FIXED: $40 CAD payment lock screen now ALWAYS appears after Xtream login (v1.44.67 race fix shipped in v1.44.68 confirmed).
REDESIGNED: payment screen scales smoothly from phone to TV with senior-friendly large text, three clearly numbered cards, and big copy buttons for the Order Number AND the email address.
